overview.description: The MFS Active Intermediate Muni Bond ETF (MFSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that consists of intermediate-term, tax-exempt US municipal bonds. It primarily invests in investment grade debt instruments but may also include high-yield bonds MFSM was launched on Dec 5, 2024 and is issued by MFS.

data.title: MFS Enters Active ETF Market
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MFS® today launched the firm's first actively managed exchange-traded funds, marking its entry into the fast-growing active ETF market, which now accounts for nearly $700 bill...
